channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BBC reveals full line-up of pundits, commentators and presenters for World Cup 2026
item.description: The BBC has announced its comprehensive team of pundits, commentators and presenters for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will take place across the United States, Canada, and Mexico from 11 June to 19 ...

item.title: U.S. Official Facilitated Visa for Polish Ex-Minister Facing Criminal Charges
item.description: Former Polish Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro, who faces 26 charges in Poland related to alleged misuse of public funds, has obtained a U.S. visa with the assistance of U.S. Deputy Secretary of State...

item.title: Democrats Cautioned Against Aligning with Thomas Massie Despite His Anti-Trump Stances
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie, a Republican from Kentucky, has recently drawn praise from some Democrats and progressives for opposing former President Donald Trump on key issues, including pushing for the relea...

item.title: Ottawa Charge Forces Game 4 in Walter Cup Final with Late Comeback Victory
item.description: In a thrilling Game 3 of the PWHL Walter Cup final, the Ottawa Charge overcame a late deficit to defeat the Montreal Victoire 2-1, keeping their championship hopes alive. Facing elimination in front o...

item.title: Teremana debuts in South Africa with a refined tequila tasting experience
item.description: Last week, Teremana, the tequila brand co-founded by Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson, made its South African debut at Truffles On The Park. Unlike many celebrity-backed launches that rely on flashy stunts, ...

item.title: Albert Hammond Jr praises The Strokes’ new album ‘Reality Awaits’ as his favourite work
item.description: Albert Hammond Jr has described The Strokes’ upcoming album, ‘Reality Awaits’, as his favourite project with the band, calling it “intoxicatingly good.” The new record, set for release on 26 June 2026...

item.title: Fourth Case of Meningitis Confirmed Among Reading School Pupils
item.description: A pupil from Westwood Farm Junior School in Reading is receiving treatment for meningitis, marking the fourth case among young people in the town linked to the same social network, according to the UK...

item.title: Metropolitan Police to submit evidence for possible charges over Grenfell Tower fire
item.description: The Metropolitan Police plan to submit evidence to the Crown Prosecution Service (CPS) for potential charges against up to 57 individuals and 20 companies over the Grenfell Tower fire, which killed 72...

item.title: Pakistan extends airspace restrictions on Indian flights until June 24
item.description: The Pakistan Civil Aviation Authority (PCAA) has extended the ban on Indian civilian and military aircraft from using Pakistani airspace until June 24, 2026. The restriction, effective from May 19 at ...

item.title: Indian Rupee Hits Record Low Against Dollar Amid Crude Price Surge and Geopolitical Tensions
item.description: On May 19, 2026, the Indian rupee slipped to a record low of 96.60 against the US dollar before closing at 96.52 in provisional trade. Analysts attribute the depreciation to multiple factors, includin...

item.title: Robinsons Land’s Steady Growth and Financial Strength Over 46 Years
item.description: Robinsons Land Corporation (RLC), the real estate arm of the Gokongwei Group, has built its reputation on stability and consistent growth over the past 46 years. Rather than pursuing rapid expansion, ...

item.title: UK braces for highest temperatures of the year, reaching 28°C
item.description: The United Kingdom is anticipated to experience the hottest day of the year so far, with temperatures expected to reach 28°C. Meteorologists have warned that this rise in temperature marks a significa...

item.title: Comelec advises early voter registration ahead of 2027 reopening and 2028 elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has urged Filipinos who intend to vote to register early, stressing the importance of avoiding last-minute rushes that can lead to inconvenience and missed opport...

item.title: Opposition Parties to Hold Nationwide Protests Against Imran Khan's Imprisonment and Economic Hardships
item.description: On Tuesday, opposition alliance Tehreek Tahaffuz Ayeen-e-Pakistan (TTAP) together with PTI declared that countrywide protests will take place on Friday. The protests are planned in response to former ...

item.title: New Jersey's Investment in Local Civic Information Strengthens Communities
item.description: During the COVID-19 pandemic, food distribution efforts in Essex County, New Jersey, highlighted a critical gap in civic information infrastructure. Simon Galperin, founder of The Jersey Bee, describe...

item.title: Florida Senate Race Poll Shows Tight Contest Between Vindman and Moody
item.description: A recent survey conducted by Change Research indicates that Democrat Alex Vindman holds a slight lead over Republican Ashley Moody in the Florida Senate race, with Vindman at 47% and Moody at 45%. The...

item.title: Adamawa and Kaduna Issue Certificates of Occupancy for Mini-Grid Solar Projects
item.description: The state governments of Adamawa and Kaduna don issue Certificates of Occupancy (C of Os) for mini-grid project sites wey dey developed under the Rural Electrification Agency (REA) Minimum Subsidy Ten...

item.title: Mother-in-law comments on Twisha Sharma's personality amid ongoing death case
item.description: The news article reported on statements made by Giribala Singh, the mother-in-law of Twisha Sharma, regarding the tragic death case of her daughter-in-law. According to the report, Giribala Singh desc...

item.title: Fuel Price Hikes in Kenya Lead to Deadly Protests and Nationwide Transport Strike
item.description: On Monday, protests erupted across several towns in Kenya following a sharp increase in fuel prices, resulting in the deaths of four people and injuring over thirty others, according to Interior Minis...

item.title: Ecca Vandal on Creative Freedom, New Album, and Touring Highlights
item.description: Australian singer Ecca Vandal has been making waves with her bold, genre-blending style of punk and rap. Her new album, 'Looking For People to Unfollow', marks a deliberate move away from social media...
